title: SceneIntent
description: The LLM output boundary (decision 2026-07-04: SceneIntent only). High-level intent with NO asset, clip, mark, or camera IDs — the deterministic resolver maps intent to approved assets and emits a SceneSpec. Free-text fields are intent vocabulary, not identifiers.

location_tag.description: Semantic location (e.g. 'small_bar_interior'); the resolver maps it to a set asset.

role_tag.description: Semantic role (e.g. 'protagonist', 'bartender'); resolver maps to a character asset.

arrives.description: Actor enters on foot at scene start: the resolver emits move cues from the role's mapped entrance (entry mark -> approach -> spawn mark) in the first shot, before any dialogue. Requires an 'entrance' block on the role in the resolver map.

departs.description: Actor exits on foot at scene end: the resolver emits rise + walk-out move cues (spawn mark -> approach -> entry mark, reverse of the entrance) in the LAST shot the actor appears in, after any dialogue. Requires the role's 'entrance' block (rise_clip/rise_duration included).

dialogue.description: Approved source lines for this beat, verbatim — the LLM transcribes, it does not write.

framing.description: Grammar-level framing intent; resolver maps to a camera_setup ID.

subject_actor_id.description: Required by the resolver when framing is close_on or medium_on.

beat_orders.description: Which beats this shot covers. REQUIRED (2026-07-06): an uncovered shot resolves empty and silently drops its beats' dialogue; requiring it also forces grammar-constrained LLM decoding to emit it.
